1Chronicles4:23 Ila ding gagawang kuran a susuyu king ari at menuknangan la king balen na ning Netaim at Gedera. 
1Chronicles4:24 Ding anak nang Simeon ila di Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zera, at i Saul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Anak neng Saul i Sallum, apu ne i Mibsam, at apu ne king tud i Misma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ding anak nang Misma ila di Hamuel, Zacur, at i Simei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Labing anam la ding anak nang lalaking Simei at anam la ding babai. Ditak la mu ding anak da ring kapatad na inya e ya meragul ing pamilya nang Simeon antimo ing pamilya nang Juda. 
1Chronicles4:28 Menuknangan la king Beerseba, Molada, Hazarsual," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilha, Ezem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuel, Horma, Ziklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet Marcabot, Hazarsusim, Betbiri, at Saaraim. Ila deti ring karelang tuknangan angga na inyang meging ari ya i David." 
1Chronicles4:32 Sakup da la naman ding siudad ning Etam, Ain, Rimon, Token ampon Asan at" 
1Chronicles4:33 pati na ding baryung makapaligid kareti angga na king Baal. Kareting lugal la menuknangan at atin lang sarili dang listahan tungkul karing makatua da. 
1Chronicles4:34 Ding lalaking pekapun da ila reti: Mesobab, Jamlek, i Josa a anak nang Amazia," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, at i Jehu a anak nang Josibias a anak nang Seraia a anak nang Asiel," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, at i Jehu a anak nang Josibias a anak nang Seraia a anak nang Asiel," 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jesohaia, Asaia, Adiel, Jesimiel, at i Benaia." 
1Chronicles4:37 Meging pekapun ya naman i Ziza a anak nang Sifi a anak Allon. Tata neng Allon i Jedaia a anak nang Simri a anak nang Semaia. 
1Chronicles4:38 Ila deti ring pekapun ning karelang lahi. Merakal la," 
1Chronicles4:39 inya minta la king aslagan at miras la king kapatagan ning Gedor ban manintun pipagpastulan. 
1Chronicles4:40 Mekatagpu lang malabung at masanting a pipagpastulan; malualas ya at tahimik a lugal. Lahi na lang Ham ding sadiang manuknangan karin. 
1Chronicles4:41 Misulat la deting lagyu da ring lahi inyang kapanaunan nang Aring Hezekia ning Juda. Ila ding linusub karing memalen na ning Meunim; gisan da lang pete at lesak ding toldang tuknangan da. Kaybat na nita, ila na ding menuknangan karin uling gabun yang masanting pipagpastulan para karing sese rang animal." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ding limang dalan kareting lahi nang Simeon ila ding linusub karing Bunduk ning Seir. Ding menimuna karela ila di Pelatia, Nearia, Refaia, at i Uziel. Ila deti ring anak nang Isi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Gisan da lang pete ding mitagan a Amalekita, at ila ding menuknangan karin angga ngeni." 
1Chronicles5:1 I Ruben ya ing pangane karing anak nang Israel. Oneng milako kang Ruben ing pangapangane uling sipingnan ne ing metung karing babaing kasese nang tata na. Miyabie kang Jose ing pangapangane. 
1Chronicles5:2 Makanyan man, ing tribu nang Juda ya ing mekilalang pamuntuk da ring mikakapatad uling ya ing mekapalto manimuna karing tribu, oneng mangaintulid ing pangapangane kang Jose." 
1Chronicles5:3 Ding anak nang Ruben, ing pangane karing anak nang Israel, ila di Enoc, Pallu, Hezron, at i Carmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 I Joel ya i tata nang Semaia, at i Semaia ya i tata nang Gog. I Gog ya i tata nang Simei a tata nang Mikeas." 
1Chronicles5:4 I Joel ya i tata nang Semaia, at i Semaia ya i tata nang Gog. I Gog ya i tata nang Simei a tata nang Mikeas." 
1Chronicles5:5 I Mikeas ya i tata nang Reaia a tata nang Baal. 
1Chronicles5:6 I Baal ya i tata nang Beera, ing manimuna da ring lahi nang Ruben a binihag na at pepayugse nang Aring Tiglat Pileser ning Asiria." 
1Chronicles5:7 Oreti ding kamaganak na agpang king listahan da ring pamilya at lahi a penibatan da: Jeiel at Zacarias, ding manimuna;" 
1Chronicles5:8 i Bela a anak nang Azaz at apu nang Sema. I tata nang Sema ya i Joel. Menuknangan la ding lahi nang Bela king Aroer; mamabut ya king Nebo at king Baal Meon ing sakup dang gabun. 
1Chronicles5:8 i Bela a anak nang Azaz at apu nang Sema. I tata nang Sema ya i Joel. Menuknangan la ding lahi nang Bela king Aroer; mamabut ya king Nebo at king Baal Meon ing sakup dang gabun. 
1Chronicles5:9 Uli na ning merakal la ding sese rang animal king Gilead, sekupan de ing dane aslagan na ning gabun manibat king ilang a mamabut king Ilug ning Eufrates." 
1Chronicles5:10 Inyang kapanaunan nang Aring Saul, lisuban na la at pete ding memalen a ausan dang Hagriteo. Kaybat sekupan de ing gabun dane aslagan na ning Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:11 Menuknangan ya ing tribu nang Gad king dane nang norti nang Ruben king sakup ning Bashan angga king aslagan ning Saleca. 
1Chronicles5:12 I Joel ya ing manimuna at ing kaduang manimuna ya i Safam. I Janai at i Safat ila ring manimuna ning Bashan. 
1Chronicles5:12 I Joel ya ing manimuna at ing kaduang manimuna ya i Safam. I Janai at i Safat ila ring manimuna ning Bashan. 
1Chronicles5:13 Ding aliwang kayabe king tribu da ila reti: Mikael, Mesullam, Seba, Jorai, Jakan, Zia, at i Eber. Pitu la ngan." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ila ding lahi nang Abihail a anak nang Huri. I Huri anak neng Jaroa; i Jaroa anak neng Gilead; i Gilead anak neng Mikael; i Mikael anak neng Jesisai; i Jesisai anak neng Jado; at i Jado anak neng Buz. 
1Chronicles5:15 I Ahi, ing anak nang Abdiel at apu nang Guni, ya ing pekapun da." 
1Chronicles5:16 Menuknangan la Bashan at Gilead karing balen da reti ampon karing lugal a pipagpastulan king Sharon. ( 
1Chronicles5:17 Ya iti ing listahan a megawa king kapanaunan nang Aring Jotam ning Juda at Aring Jeroboam a Kadua ning Israel.) 
1Chronicles5:18 Atin yang mangatapang a lalaki ing tribu nang Ruben, Gad, at ing tribu nang Manase dane Aslagan. Magaling la king pamangamit kalasag, espada, pana, at king pamakilaban. Apat lang pulu't apat a libu at pitung dalan anam apulu heganagana." 
1Chronicles5:19 Mekilaban la karing Hagriteo ning Jetur, Nafis, at Nodab." 
1Chronicles5:20 Menalig la king Dios at menalangin. Pekibatan na ning Dios ing panalangin da at dininan na lang tagumpe karing kalaban dang Hagriteo at ding kakampi ra. 
1Chronicles5:21 Mekabihag la namang limang pulung libung kamelyu, aduang dalan limang pulung libung tupa, at aduang libung asno. Dinalan a libu la ding abihag dang kalaban." 
1Chronicles5:22 Dakal la ding apate rang kalaban uling kaburian ning Dios ing milyaring labanan. At king lugal a ita karin la menuknangan angga na kanitang miras ing pangayugse ning Israel. 
1Chronicles5:23 Menuknangan ya ing tribu nang Manase dane Aslagan king Bashan angga na king Baal Hermon, Senir, at king Bunduk ning Hermon. Mabilis lang merakal." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ding pekapun da ila di Efer, Isi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremias, Hodavia, at i Jadiel. Mangayap la ngan sundalus at pikabaluan a manimuna." 
1Chronicles5:25 Oneng sinalangsang ya iting tribu nang Manase dane Aslagan laban king Dios da ring makatua ra. Sinamba ya karing dios a kikilalanan da ring bansang tinabi na ning Dios. 
1Chronicles5:26 Inya ginamit ne ning Dios i Aring Pul ning Asiria (a pikabaluan munaman king lagyung Tiglat Pileser) ban lusuban na la. Binihag na la niti ding memalen na ning Ruben, Gad, at ing tribu nang Manase dane Aslagan; miyugse la at menuknangan angga ngeni king Hala, Habor, Hara, at king pampang ning Ilug ning Gozan." 
1Chronicles6:1 Ding anak nang Levi ila di Gerson, Kohat, at i Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ding anak na namang Kohat ila di Amram, Izar, Hebron, at i Uzziel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ding anak nang Amram ila di Aaron at Moises. I Miriam ya ing kapatad dang babai. Ding anak nang lalaking Aaron ila di Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, at i Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Anak neng Eleazar i Fineas, at anak neng Fineas i Abisua;" 
1Chronicles6:5 anak neng Abisua i Bukki, at anak neng Bukki i Uzzi." 
1Chronicles6:6 Anak neng Uzzi i Zerahia, at anak neng Zerahia i Meraiot." 
1Chronicles6:7 Anak neng Meraiot i Amaria, at anak neng Amaria i Ahitub." 
1Chronicles6:8 Anak neng Ahitub i Zadok, at anak neng Zadok i Ahimaaz." 
1Chronicles6:9 Anak neng Ahimaaz i Azaria, at anak neng Azaria i Joanan." 
1Chronicles6:10 Anak neng Joanan i Azaria (ing sinuyu king Templong pepagawa nang Aring Solomon king Jerusalem). 
1Chronicles6:11 Anak neng Azaria i Amaria, at anak neng Amaria i Ahitub." 
1Chronicles6:12 Anak neng Ahitub i Zadok, at anak neng Zadok i Sallum." 
1Chronicles6:13 Anak neng Sallum i Hilkia, at anak neng Hilkia i Azaria." 
1Chronicles6:14 Anak neng Azaria i Seraia, at anak neng Seraia i Jeozadak." 
1Chronicles6:15 I Jeozadak ya itang akayabe da ring taung miyugse inyang peintulut ning Ginu ing miyugse la ding memalen na ning Juda at Jerusalem king gamat na ning Aring Nebucadenesar. 
1Chronicles6:16 Ding anak nang Levi ila di Gerson, Kohat, at i Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Anak na lang Gerson di Libni at Simei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Ding anak nang Kohat ila di Amram, Izar, Hebron, at i Uzziel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Ding anak na namang Merari ila di Mahli at Musi. Ila deti ring lahi nang Levi karing meging anak na. 
1Chronicles6:20 Ila deti ring mituki-tuking lahi nang Gerson: i Libni, at anak neng Libni i Jahat, at anak neng Jahat i Zimma." 
1Chronicles6:21 Anak neng Zimma i Joa, at anak neng Joa i Iddo, at anak neng Iddo i Zera. Anak neng Zera i Jeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ila deti ring mituki-tuking lahi nang Kohat: i Aminadab, at anak neng Aminadab i Kora. Anak neng Kora i Asir," 
1Chronicles6:23 at anak neng Asir i Elkana. Anak neng Elkana i Ebiasaf, at anak neng Ebiasaf i Asir." 
1Chronicles6:24 Anak neng Asir i Tahat, at anak neng Tahat i Uriel. Anak neng Uriel i Uzzia, at anak neng Uzzia i Saul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ding anak nang Elkana ila ri Amasai at Ahimot. 
1Chronicles6:26 Anak neng Ahimot i Elkana, at anak neng Elkana i Sofai. Anak neng Sofai i Nahat," 
1Chronicles6:27 at anak neng Nahat i Eliab. Anak neng Eliab i Jeroham, at anak neng Jeroham i Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ding anak nang Samuel ila ri Joel, ing pangane, at ing wali ya i Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ding anak nang Samuel ila ri Joel, ing pangane, at ing wali ya i Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Anak neng Merari i Mahli, at anak neng Mahli i Libni. Anak neng Libni i Simei, at anak neng Simei i Uzza." 
1Chronicles6:30 Anak neng Uzza i Simea, at anak neng Simea i Haggia. Anak neng Haggia i Asaia." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ating lalaking dininan nang pakibatan Aring David king pamagkanta king Bale tuknangan ning Ginu inyang milipat ya king Jerusalem ing Kaban ning Kasunduan. 
1Chronicles6:32 Ila ding miliwas-liwas gaganap king katungkulan king arap ning Bale tuknangan ning Ginu angga na inyang pepatalakad neng Aring Solomon ing Templo. 
1Chronicles6:33 Ila deti ring pamilya at ding anak da a sinuyu: King pamilya nang KohatI Heman, ing talapagkanta a anak nang Joel a anak nang Samuel." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ila deti ring pamilya at ding anak da a sinuyu: King pamilya nang KohatI Heman, ing talapagkanta a anak nang Joel a anak nang Samuel." 
1Chronicles6:34 I Samuel anak neng Elkana, at i Elkana anak neng Jeroham. I Jeroham anak neng Eliel, at i Eliel anak neng Toa." 
1Chronicles6:35 I Toa anak neng Zuf, at i Zuf anak neng Elkana. I Elkana anak neng Mahat, at i Mahat anak neng Amasai." 
1Chronicles6:36 I Amasai anak neng Elkana, at i Elkana anak neng Joel. I Joel anak neng Azaria, at i Azaria anak neng Zefania." 
1Chronicles6:36 I Amasai anak neng Elkana, at i Elkana anak neng Joel. I Joel anak neng Azaria, at i Azaria anak neng Zefania." 
1Chronicles6:37 I Zefania anak neng Tahat, at i Tahat anak neng Asir. I Asir anak neng Ebiasaf, at i Ebiasaf anak neng Kora." 
1Chronicles6:38 I Kora anak neng Izar, at i Izar anak neng Kohat. I Kohat anak neng Levi, at i Levi anak neng Jacob." 
1Chronicles6:39 King banda nang wanan Heman, ing mamahala ya ing kapatad nang i Asaf a anak nang Berekia at apu nang Simea." 
1Chronicles6:40 I Simea anak neng Mikael, at i Mikael anak neng Baaseia. I Baaseia anak neng Malkia," 
1Chronicles6:41 at i Malkia anak neng Etni. I Etni anak neng Zera, at i Zera anak neng Adaia." 
1Chronicles6:42 I Adaia anak neng Etan, at i Etan anak neng Zimma. I Zimma anak neng Simei," 
1Chronicles6:43 at i Simei anak neng Jahat. I Jahat anak neng Gerson, at i Gerson anak neng Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 King banda nang kayling Heman, ding mamahala ila ding anak nang Merari: i Etan anak neng Kishi. I Kishi anak neng Abdi, at i Abdi anak neng Malluk." 
1Chronicles6:45 I Malluk anak neng Hasabia, at i Hasabia anak neng Amazia. I Amazia anak neng Hilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 at i Hilkia anak neng Amzi. I Amzi anak neng Bani, at i Bani anak neng Semer." 
1Chronicles6:47 I Semer anak neng Mahli, at i Mahli anak neng Musi. I Musi anak neng Merari, at i Merari anak neng Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ding darapat king miyayaliwang katungkulan king tolda a Bale na ning Dios ila ring aliwang kapatad dang Levita. 
1Chronicles6:49 I Aaron at ding anak na ila ring bukud miyayain karing ain-a-durulukan at duruluk insenso king altar. Ila ring manimuna karing kasuyuan king Kabanal-banalan a Lugal, at babie ain para king pangapatawaran na ning kasalanan ning Israel, agpang king inutus nang Moises, ing talasuyu na ning Dios." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ila deti ring anak nang Aaron: Eleazar, ing tata nang Fineas. Anak neng Fineas i Abisua." 
1Chronicles6:51 Anak neng Abisua i Bukki, at i Bukki anak ne i Uzzi. I Uzzi anak ne i Zerahia." 
1Chronicles6:52 Anak neng Zerahia i Meraiot, at anak neng Meraiot i Amaria, at anak neng Amaria i Ahitub." 
1Chronicles6:53 Anak neng Ahitub i Zadok, at anak neng Zadok i Ahimaaz." 
1Chronicles6:54 Mitakda ya para kang Kohat at karing anak na a lahi nang Aaron ing lugal a maging tuknangan da. Tinggap de ing mumuna nang dake ning gabun a mitakda para karing Levita. 
1Chronicles6:55 Kayabe ya kaniti ing Hebron a sakup ning Juda, at ding pipagpastulan king makapaligid na niti." 
1Chronicles6:56 Ding marangle na ning siudad at ding baryu na niti miyabie la kang Caleb a anak nang Jefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Miyabie la karing anak nang Aaron ding siudad a santungan antimo ing Hebron, ing Libna at ding pipagpastulan na, Jatir, at ing Estemoa pati na ding pipagpastulan na," 
1Chronicles6:58 ing Hilen at Debir pati na ding pipagpastulan da," 
1Chronicles6:59 ing Asan at Bet Semes at ding pipagpastulan da. 
1Chronicles6:60 Ing ikua da king tribu nang Benjamin ya ing Geba, Alemet, at ing Anatot pati ding makapaligid a pipagpastulan da. Labi lang atlung siudad ding miras karela." 
1Chronicles6:61 King kapamilatan na ning bagutan, apulu lang siudad ding ikua da ring pamilya nang Kohat a ibat king tribu nang Manase dane Albugan." 
1Chronicles6:62 Karing anak nang Gerson, labi lang atlung siudad ding miyabie a ibat karing sakup da ring tribung Isacar, Aser, Neftali, at king tribu nang Manase dane Aslagan king Bashan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Karing anak nang Merari, labi lang aduang siudad ding miyabie a ibat karing sakup da ring tribung Ruben, Gad, at Zebulun." 
1Chronicles6:64 Mitakda lang siudad dang tuknangan at pipagpastulan ding memalen na ning Israel para karing Levita. ( 
1Chronicles6:65 Miyabie la naman karela ding siudad a ibat karing tribung Juda, Simeon, at Benjamin. Miras la karela king kapamilatan na ning bagutan.)" 
1Chronicles6:66 Ding mapilan karing anak nang Kohat midinan lang siudad at pipagpastulan king gabun a sakup na ning tribu nang Efraim: 
1Chronicles6:67 ing Sikem, ing siudad a santungan king bunduk-bundukan ning Efraim, at pati na ding pipagpastulan na niti, ing Gezer at ding pipagpastulan na," 
1Chronicles6:68 ing Jokmeam at ding pipagpastulan na, ing Bet Horon at ding pipagpastulan na," 
1Chronicles6:69 ing Ayalon at ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Gat Rimon pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:70 King gabun a sakup na ning tribu ning Manase dane Albugan, miyabie ya karela ing siudad ning Aner pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Bileam pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:71 Miyabie ya karing anak nang Gerson itang gabun a sakup na ning tribu nang Manase dane Aslagan: ing Golan king Bashan pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Astarot pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:72 King sakup na ning tribu nang Isacar: ing Kedes pati na ding pipagpastulan na, ing Daberat pati na ding pipagpastulan na," 
1Chronicles6:73 ing Ramot pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Anem pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:74 King sakup na ning tribu nang Aser: ing Masal pati na ding pipagpastulan na, ing Abdon pati na ding pipagpastulan na," 
1Chronicles6:75 ing Hukok pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Rehob pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:76 King sakup na ning tribu nang Neftali: ing Kedes ning Galilea pati na ding pipagpastulan na, ing Hammon pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Kiriataim pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:77 Karing aliwa pang lahi nang Merari, miyabie la karela ding gabun a sakup na ning tribu nang Zebulun: ing Rimono pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Tabor pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:78 King sakup na ning tribu nang Ruben dane aslagan ning Ilug ning Jordan lele ning Jerico: ing Bezer king ilang pati na ding pipagpastulan na, ing Jaza pati na ding pipagpastulan na," 
1Chronicles6:79 ing Kedemot pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Mefaat pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles6:80 King sakup na ning tribu nang Gad: ing Ramot ning Gilead pati na ding pipagpastulan na, ing Mahanaim pati na ding pipagpastulan na," 
1Chronicles6:81 ing Hesbon pati na ding pipagpastulan na, at ing Jazer pati na ding pipagpastulan na." 
1Chronicles7:1 Ding anak nang Isacar ila di Tola, Pua, Jasub, at i Simron." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ding anak nang Tola ila di Uzzi, Refaia, Jeriel, Jamai, Ibsam, at i Semuel. Ila ding pekapun at pikabaluan la king katapangan. Adua lang pulu't aduang libu at anam a ralan king bilang inyang kapanaunan nang Aring David." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ing anak nang Uzzi ya i Izrahia, at ding anak nang Izrahia ila di Mikael, Obadias, Joel, at i Issia. Pekapun la deting anak." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ing anak nang Uzzi ya i Izrahia, at ding anak nang Izrahia ila di Mikael, Obadias, Joel, at i Issia. Pekapun la deting anak." 
1Chronicles7:4 Dakal la asawa at anak a lalaki, inya mekapalto lang atlung pulu't anam a libung sundalus." 
1Chronicles7:5 Walu lang pulu't pitung libu ding aliwa ra pang kamaganak a sundalus a ibat king tribu nang Isacar. 
1Chronicles7:6 Ding anak nang Benjamin ila di Bela, Beker, at i Jediael." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ding anak nang Bela ila di Esbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimot, at i Iri. Pikabaluan la ngang sundalus at pekapun la karing karelang sarasariling pamilya. Adua lang pulu't aduang libu at atlung pulu't apat a sundalus, agpang king listahan na ning karelang pamilya." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ding anak nang Beker ila di Zemira, Joas, Eliezer, Eleoenai, Omri, Jeremot, Abiya, Anatot, at i Alemet." 
1Chronicles7:9 Agpang king listahan da ring karelang sarasariling pamilya, adua lang pulung libu at aduang dalan ding karelang sundalus. Kayabe la kareti ding karelang manimuna." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ing anak nang Jediael ya i Bilhan. Ding anak na namang Bilhan ila di Jeus, Benjamin, Ehud, Kenaana, Zetan, Tarsis, at i Ahisahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Pekapun la reting anak nang Bilhan karing sarasarili dang pamilya. Pikabaluan la ngang sundalus. Atin lang labing pitung libu at aduang dalan a sundalus a makasadiang makilaban. 
1Chronicles7:12 I Supim at i Hupim anak na lang Ir. I Husim anak neng Aher. 
1Chronicles7:13 Ding anak nang Neftali ila di Jaziel, Guni, Jezer, at i Sallum. (Lahi na lang Bilha.)" 
1Chronicles7:14 Ding ayanak nang Manase king babaing kasese nang Aramea ila di Asriel at Makir. I Makir ya i tata nang Gilead. 
1Chronicles7:15 Menakit yang metung a babai i Makir para maging asawa nang Hupim, at antimu rin metung pang babai para kang Supim. Maaca ya lagyu ing kapatad nang babaing Makir, at Zelofehad ya lagyu ing kadua nang anak. Atin yang anak a babai i Zelofehad." 
1Chronicles7:16 Ding anak nang Makir king asawa nang i Maaca ila di Perez at Seres. Ila deti ring pemalagyu ra karela. Ding anak nang Perez ila di Ulam at Rakem. 
1Chronicles7:17 Ing anak nang Ulam ya i Bedan. Ila deti ring lahi nang Gilead a anak nang Makir at apu nang Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 I Hammoleket ya ing kapatad nang babaing Gilead, at ding anak nang Hammoleket ila di Isod, Abiezer, at i Mahla. (" 
1Chronicles7:19 Ding anak nang Semida ila di Ahian, Sikem, Likhi, at i Aniam.)" 
1Chronicles7:20 Ing anak nang Efraim ya i Sutela. Anak neng Sutela i Bered, at anak neng Bered i Tahat. Anak neng Tahat i Eleada. Anak na ne mang Eleada i Tahat." 
1Chronicles7:21 Anak neng Tahat i Zabad, at i Zabad anak ne i Sutela. Subali pa kang Sutela, atin ya pang anak i Efraim. Ila di Ezer at Elead a pete da ring taung bait at meragul king Gat uling penako da la ring baka ra." 
1Chronicles7:22 Pigkalungkutan na lang Efraim a tata ra kilub ding dakal a aldo, at dinatang la ding kapatad na ba reng pasiknangan a lub." 
1Chronicles7:23 Kaybat na nita, sipingnan ne ing asawa na at mebuktut ya at menganak yang metung a lalaki. Pemalagyuan neng Beria uli na ning kaguluan a miras king pamilya ra." 
1Chronicles7:24 Atin yang anak a babai i Efraim; Seera ing lagyu na. Ya ing mitatag karing balen na ning Mababa at Matas ning Bet Horon, at ing Uzen Seera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Atin ya pang aliwang anak i Efraim; Refa ing lagyu na. Anak neng Refa i Resef, at anak neng Resef i Tela. Anak neng Tela i Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 at anak neng Tahan i Ladan. Anak neng Ladan i Amiud, at anak neng Amiud i Elisama." 
1Chronicles7:27 At anak neng Elisama i Nun, at anak neng Nun i Josue." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ding sakup dang gabun at meging tuknangan da ila ding Betel at ding makapadurut nang balen angga na king aslagan na ning Naaran at albugan ning Gezer at ding balen a makapadurut kaniti. Kayabe la naman ding siudad na ning Sikem ampon Ayya at ding balen a makapadurut kareti. 
1Chronicles7:29 Ding lahi nang Manase ila ding sasakup karing siudad na ning Bet Sean, Taanak, Megido, at ing Dor ampon ding balen a makapadurut kareti. Ila deti ring lugal nung nu la menuknangan ding lahi nang Jose a anak nang Jacob." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ding anak nang Aser ila di Imna, Isva, Isvi, at i Beria. I Sera ya ing kapatad dang babai." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ding anak nang Beria ila di Heber at Malkiel a tata nang Birzait. 
1Chronicles7:32 Ding anak nang Heber ila di Jaflet, Somer, at i Hotam. I Shua ya ing kapatad dang babai." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ding anak nang Jaflet ila di Pasak, Bimhal, at i Asvat." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ding anak na ning kapatad nang i Somer ila di Roga, Jeuba, at i Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ding anak na ning kapatad nang i Helem ila di Zofa, Imna, Seles, at i Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ding anak nang Zofa ila di Suah, Harnefer, Shual, Beri, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezer, Hod, Samma, Silsa, Itran, at i Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ding anak nang Jeter ila di Jefune, Pispa, Ara," 
1Chronicles7:39 at ding anak nang Ulla ila di Ara, Haniel, at i Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Ila ngan deti ring lahi nang Aser. Pekapun la karing sarasarili rang pamilya; pili lang lalaki at pikabaluan king katapangan, at pekapun da la ring manimuna. Agpang king karelang listahan, adua lang pulu't anam a libu ring lalaking makasadiang makilaban." 
1Chronicles8:1 Ding anak nang Benjamin ila di Bela, ing pangane, ing katuki na ya i Asbel, ing katlu ya i Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 ing kapat ya i Noha, at ing kalima ya i Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Ding anak nang Bela ila di Addar, Gera, Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisua, Naaman, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Sefufan, at i Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ding anak nang Ehud ila di Naaman, Ahiya, at i Gera. Ila ding pekapun ding pamilya a manuknangan king Geba, oneng mepilitan lang linipat king Manahat. I Gera a tata nang Uzza at i Ahihud ila ding menimuna king pamaglipat da king aliwang lugal." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Kewanian na lang Saharaim ding adua nang asawang i Husim at i Baara. Kanitang menuknangan ya king Moab ayasawa ne i Hodes 
1Chronicles8:9 at ayanak da la ri Jobab, Zibia, Mesa, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:9 at ayanak da la ri Jobab, Zibia, Mesa, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeus, Sakia, at i Mirma. Ila deti ring anak a meging pekapun karing sarasarili rang pamilya." 
1Chronicles8:11 Mikayanak ya naman kang Husim; ila di Abitub at Elpaal. 
1Chronicles8:12 Ding anak nang Elpaal ila di Eber, Misam, at i Semed. I Semed ya ing mitatag karing siudad na ning Ono at Lod at ding balen a makapadurut kareti." 
1Chronicles8:13 I Beria at i Sema, ding pekapun da ring pamilyang menuknangan king Ayalon kaybat da lang atabi ding memalen na ning Gat." 
1Chronicles8:14 Anak na lang Beria di Ahio, Sasak, Jeremot," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadia, Arad, Eder," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikael, Ispa, at i Joa." 
1Chronicles8:17 Ding anak nang Elpaal ila di Zebadia, Mesullam, Hizki, Heber," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismerai, Izlia, at i Jobab." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismerai, Izlia, at i Jobab." 
1Chronicles8:19 Ding anak na namang Simei ila di Jakim, Zikri, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Ziletai, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaia, Beraia, at i Simrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ding anak na namang Sasak ila di Ispan, Eber, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zikri, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania, Elam, Antotija," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifdeia, at i Penuel." 
1Chronicles8:26 Ding anak na namang Jeroham ila di Samserai, Seharia, Atalia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaareshia, Elias, at i Zikri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ila deti ring pekapun at ding manimuna da ring lahi nang Benjamin a menuknangan king Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles8:29 I Jeiel ya ing mitatag king siudad ning Gibeon at karin ya menuknangan. Maaca ya lagyu ing asawa na. 
1Chronicles8:30 I Abdon ya ing pangane nang anak; ding aliwa nang anak ila di Zur, Kis, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedor, Ahio, Zacarias," 
1Chronicles8:32 at i Miklot a tata nang Simea. Menuknangan la ding karelang lahi king Jerusalem at siping da ring karelang kamaganak. 
1Chronicles8:33 I Ner ya i tata nang Kis, at i Kis ya i tata nang Saul. I Saul naman ya i tata da ri Jonatan, Malkisua, Abinadab, at i Esbaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 I Jonatan ya i tata nang Meribaal. I Meribaal ya i tata nang Mikeas. 
1Chronicles8:35 Ding anak nang Mikeas ila di Piton, Melek, Tarea, at i Ahaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 I Ahaz ya i tata nang Jeoadda, at i Jeoadda ya i tata da ri Alemet, Azmavet, at i Zimri. I Zimri ya i tata nang Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 I Moza ya i tata nang Binea, at i Binea ya i tata nang Rafa. I Rafa ya i tata nang Eleasa, at i Eleasa ya i tata nang Azel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Atin yang anam a anak i Azel; ila di Azrikam, Bokeru, Ismael, Searia, Obadias, at i Hanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ding anak nang Esek a kapatad nang Azel ila di Ulam, ing pangane, i Jeus, ing pangadua, at i Elifelet, ing bungsu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Matapang la ngang sundalus at mangagaling mamana ding anak nang Ulam. Mika dinalan limang pulu yang anak a lalaki at apu. Ding sablang mesaglawe lagyu lahi na la ngang Benjamin. 
1Chronicles9:1 Milista la ngan ding sablang memalen na ning Israel agpang king tribung kayayaniban da. Misulat iti king Istoria da ring Ari ning Israel at ding memalen na ning Juda a miyugse king Babilonia uli na ning keyalan dang katapatan king Dios. 
1Chronicles9:2 Ding minunang mibalik karing karelang siudad at tuknangan ila ding lalaki na ning Israel, ding pari, ding Levita, at ding susuyu king Templo ning Dios." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ating karing tribu nang Juda, Benjamin, Efraim, at Manase ding menuknangan king Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:4 I Utai, ing metung karing lahi nang Juda king anak nang i Perez, ya ing manimuna king pamilya ra. I Utai anak neng Amiud at apu neng Omri. I Omri anak neng Imri at apu neng Bani." 
1Chronicles9:5 I Asaia, ing metung munaman karing lahi nang Juda king anak nang i Sela, ya ing manimuna king pamilya ra." 
1Chronicles9:6 I Jeuel, ing metung pang lahi nang Juda king anak nang i Zera, ya ing manimuna king pamilya ra. Anam a ralan siam apulu la ding pamilya na ning tribu nang Juda ding menuknangan king Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:7 I Sallu a anak nang Mesullam ya ing metung karing lahi nang Benjamin a menuknangan king Jerusalem. Tata neng Mesullam i Hodavia, at tata neng Hodavia i Hasenua." 
1Chronicles9:8 Ing aliwa pang menuknangan karin ya i Ibneia, ing anak nang Jeroham. Tata neng Ela i Uzzi. Tata neng Uzzi i Mikri. Tata neng Mesullam i Sefatia, at tata neng Sefatia i Reuel. Tata neng Reuel i Ibnia." 
1Chronicles9:9 Siam lang dalan limang pulu't anam ding pamilya na ning tribu ding menuknangan karin. Ding sablang lalaking mebanggit pekapun la ngan karing sarasarili dang pamilya. 
1Chronicles9:10 Ding pari a menuknangan king Jerusalem ila ri Jedaia, Jeoiarib, at i Jakin." 
1Chronicles9:11 I Azaria a anak nang Hilkia at apu nang Mesullam ya ing pekapamuntuk karing opisyal na ning Bale ning Dios. Ding makatua na ila di Mesullam a anak nang Zadok. Tata neng Zadok i Meraiot, at tata neng Meraiot i Ahitub." 
1Chronicles9:12 Menuknangan ya naman karin i Adaia a anak nang Jeroham. Tata neng Jeroham i Pasur, at tata neng Pasur i Malkia. Tata neng Maasai i Adiel. Tata neng Adiel i Jasera, at tata neng Jasera i Mesullam. Tata neng Mesullam i Mesilemit, at tata neng Mesilemit i Immer." 
1Chronicles9:13 Libu pitung dalan anam apulu la heganagana deting paring pekapun karing sarasarili dang pamilya. Mayagyu la ngan king obra na ning Bale ning Dios. 
1Chronicles9:14 Ding Levitang menuknangan king Jerusalem ila deti: i Semaia a anak nang Hasub, at tata neng Hasub i Azrikam, at tata neng Azrikam i Hasabia, a lahi na ngan Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 i Bakbakar, Heres, Galal, at i Matania a anak nang Mika, at tata neng Mika i Zikri, at tata neng Zikri i Asaf;" 
1Chronicles9:16 i Obadias a anak nang Semaia, at i Semaia anak neng Galal, at tata neng Galal i Jedutun, at tata neng Jedutun i Berekia, at tata neng Berekia i Asa, at tata neng Asa i Elkana a menuknangan karing baryu da ring Netofatiteo." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ding guardia karing pasbul-dalan ning Bale ning Dios a menuknangan king Jerusalem ila di Sallum, Akub, Talmon, Ahiman, at ding karelang kamaganak. I Sallum ya ing manimuna da." 
1Chronicles9:18 Ila ding makatutuk magguardia king dalan palub king dane aslagan na ning Pasbul Dalan ning Ari. King misan a panaun, ila ding migguardia karing pasbul dalan da ring kampu da ring Levita." 
1Chronicles9:19 Menuknangan ya naman karin i Sallum at ding kamaganak na. I Sallum anak neng Kore at apu neng Ebiasaf at apu ne king tud Kora. Ila ding guguardia king dalan palub king Toldang tuknangan ning Ginu antimo ding karelang makatua a migguardia king kampu ning Ginu. 
1Chronicles9:20 Menuknangan ya naman karin i Fineas a anak nang Eleazar, at metung ya karing meging manimuna da. Sana matnube ya ing Ginu kang Fineas." 
1Chronicles9:21 Menuknangan ya naman karin i Zacarias a anak nang Meselemia. Guardia ya naman king dalan palub king Toldang tuknangan ning Ginu. 
1Chronicles9:22 Adua lang dalan labing adua ding mepiling magguardia karing pidadalanan at pasbul dalan. Makalista la ngan agpang karing baryung karelang tuknangan. I Aring David at i propeta Samuel ila ding mibili karing karelang makatua kareting obra da. 
1Chronicles9:23 Ila at ding meging anak da at kayapu-apuan ding menatiling guguardia karing pasbul dalan na ning Bale ning Ginu. 
1Chronicles9:24 Ating guardia king balang metung at metung karing apat a pasbul dalan dane aslagan, albugan, mauli, at norti." 
1Chronicles9:25 Kasaup da la reting guardia ding karelang kamaganak a manuknangan karing baryu, at liwas-liwas lang magguardia kilub ding tuki-tuking pitung aldo." 
1Chronicles9:26 Levita la ding apat a manimuna da ring guardia at pagkatiwalan la uling ila ding ating pakibatan at mamahala karing kuartu at karing pisisinupan pibandian na ning Bale ning Dios. 
1Chronicles9:27 Menuknangan la lele na ning Bale ning Dios, uling katungkulan da ing guardian de iti at ibuklat ding pasbul dalan neng abak." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ding aliwa karing Levita ila ding ating pakibatan karing kasangkapan a magagamit king pamanyamba. Ila ding milulual kareting kasangkapan at kaybat isikap da la. 
1Chronicles9:29 Ding aliwa pang Levita ila ring ating pakibatan karing sagradung kasangkapan, king arina, alak, larung olibo, insenso, at ding pabanglu." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ding ating pakibatan king pamangawang pabanglu ila ding pari. 
1Chronicles9:31 I Matitia, ing metung karing Levita a anak nang pangane Sallum ning lahi nang Kora, ya ing mangawa karing tinape maimpis." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ating mapilan karing lahi nang Kora a ating pakibatan king pangasadia da ring tinape para king Bale ning Dios neng Aldo ning Sabbath. 
1Chronicles9:33 Ding aliwa karing pamilyang Levita ila ding ating pakibatan king pamagkanta. Manuknangan la ding pekapun da reting pamilya karing gusali na ning Bale ning Dios, at ala na lang aliwa pang pakibatan, uling aldo't bengi iti ing katungkulan da." 
1Chronicles9:34 Deting lalaking mesambitla ila ding buntuk da ring pamilya ding Levita. Ila ding manimuna a menuknangan king Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles9:35 I Jeiel ya ing mitatag king siudad ning Gibeon at karin ya menuknangan. Maaca ya lagyu ing asawa na. 
1Chronicles9:36 I Abdon ya ing pangane nang anak; ding aliwa nang anak ila di Zur, Kis, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Ahio, Zacarias, at i Miklot" 
1Chronicles9:38 a tata nang Simea. Menuknangan la ding lahi ra king Jerusalem at siping da ring kamaganak da. 
1Chronicles9:39 I Ner ya i tata nang Kis, at i Kis ya i tata nang Saul. I Saul ya i tata da ri Jonatan, Malkisua, Abinadab, at i Esbaal." 
1Chronicles9:40 I Jonatan ya i tata nang Meribaal, at i Meribaal ya i tata nang Mikeas." 
1Chronicles9:41 Ding anak nang Mikeas ila ri Piton, Melek, Tarea, at i Ahaz." 
1Chronicles9:42 I Ahaz ya i tata nang Jara, at i Jara ya i tata da ri Alemet, Azmavet, at i Zimri. I Zimri ya i tata nang Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 I Moza ya i tata nang Binea, at i Binea ya i tata nang Refaia. I Refaia ya i tata nang Eleasa, at i Eleasa ya i tata nang Azel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Atin yang anam a anak i Azel; ila di Azrikam, Bokeru, Ismael, Searia, Obadias, at i Hanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 Mekilaban la ding Filisteo karing Israelita king Bunduk ning Gilboa. Dakal la ding mete karing Israelita. Tinakas la ding mitagan at pati na i Aring Saul at ding anak na. 
1Chronicles10:2 Oneng tinagal la ding Filisteo at atagal da la at pete ding anak nang Saul: i Jonatan, Abinadab, at i Malkisua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Mabagsik ing labanan at tiran ne ning paslu ning kalaban i Saul at grabi ya ing sugat na. 
1Chronicles10:4 Nganang Saul king talapagdala nang armas, Bagutan me ing espada mu at paten mu ku ban kanita e ra ku akuang gawang pikaylian deting paganung Filisteo. Oneng e mebisa ing talapagdala nang armas uli na ning tatakut ya. Inya kinua neng Saul ing sarili nang espada at sikban ne iti." 
1Chronicles10:5 Inyang ikit neng mete i Saul, sikban nia naman ing espada na at mete ya." 
1Chronicles10:6 Mete ya i Saul at ding atlu nang anak, at ala neng lahi a mig-ari pa." 
1Chronicles10:7 Inyang ikit da ring Israelitang atyu king kasumangid ning Kapatagan ning Jezreel king memulayi lang tinakas ding sundalus na ning Israel at king mete ne i Saul at ding anak na, likuan da la ring balen da at tinakas na la naman. Dinatang la ding Filisteo at ila ding sinakup karin." 
1Chronicles10:8 Kabukasan, kaybat ning labanan, minta la ding Filisteo ban kuanan da ing nanumang bage akua ra karing mete Israelita, at atagpuan de ing bangke nang Saul at ding anak na a makapase king Bunduk ning Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Tibtab de batal i Saul at leko re ing baluti na. Kaybat na nita, mitubud lang tau ban ibalita king mabilug a Filistia ing mayap a balita karing kikilalanan dang dios at karing karelang kabalen." 
1Chronicles10:10 Dela re king metung karing karelang templo ing baluti nang Saul, at sinabit de ing buntuk na king templo na ning dios dang i Dagon." 
1Chronicles10:11 Inyang abalitan da ring memalen na ning Jabes ning Gilead ing depat da ring Filisteo kang Saul," 
1Chronicles10:12 meko la ding matapang dili karing lalaki ban kuanan de ing katawan nang Saul at ding anak na. Dela da la king Jabes. Kitkut da la karin king lalam ning tanaman a ensina at mig-ayunu la kilub ding pitung aldo. 
1Chronicles10:13 Mete ya i Saul uli na ning e ya meging tapat king Ginu. Lebagan na la ding utus na ning Ginu, at uling meniawad yang payu karing espiritu da ring mete" 
1Chronicles10:14 lugal king Ginu ya maniawad payu. Inya pete ne ning Ginu at linipat ne ing kayarian kang David a anak nang Jese. 
1Chronicles11:1 Pintalan de ring sablang memalen na ning Israel i David karin king Hebron at ngara, Laman mu kami at daya." 
1Chronicles11:2 King milabas a panaun, agyang i Saul ya ing ari, ika ing menimuna king Israel king pamakilaban, at ing Ginung kekang Dios ya ing mengaku kekang ika ing manimuna karing memalen na at ika ing maging pamuntuk da." 
1Chronicles11:3 Inya pintalan de ring sablang manimuna na ning Israel i Aring David king Hebron. Ginawa yang metung a taimtim a kasunduan karela. Linian deng laru at gewang ari na ning Israel, antimo ing pengaku ning Ginu king kapamilatan nang Samuel." 
1Chronicles11:4 Minta ya i Aring David at ding sablang Israelita king Jerusalem ban lusuban de iti. Jebus ya lagyu kanita ing Jerusalem, at ding Jebuseo ila ding manuknangan karin." 
1Chronicles11:5 Ngara ding Jebuseo kang David, E ka malyaring lungub keti. Oneng abihag neng David ing kuta ning Zion, at ngeni ya meging pikabaluan a Siudad nang David." 
1Chronicles11:6 Nganang David, Gawan keng pekapun da ring sundalus ing mumunang makapate Jebuseo. I Joab ya ing menimuna king pamaglusub at ya ing meging pekapun da. I ima nang Joab ya i Zeruia." 
1Chronicles11:7 Karin ya menuknangan king kuta ning Zion i David, inya inaus de iting Siudad nang David." 
1Chronicles11:8 Pepalarin ne ing siudad manibat king Milo a timbakan gabun, at i Joab naman ya ing miglarin king mitagan a sira king siudad." 
1Chronicles11:9 Meging masikan ya aldo-aldo i David, uling ing Ginung Mayupaya mamantabe ya kang David." 
1Chronicles11:10 Atin yang pikabaluan a sundalus i David at deti ampon ding memalen na ning Israel seupan deng meging ari, antimo ing pengaku ning Ginu. Ila ding minie saup kang David ban maging matatag ya ing kayarian na. Ila deti:" 
1Chronicles11:11 Ing mumuna ya i Jasobeam ning pamilya ning Hakmon. Ya ing manimuna da ring Atlu. Ya ing mekilaban karing atlung dalan a kalaban, at apate na la ngan king uli namu ning tandus na." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ing kadua kareting pikabaluan a Atlu ya i Eleazar a anak nang Dodo ning pamilya nang Aho. 
1Chronicles11:13 Kayabe neng David inyang mekilaban ya karing Filisteo king Pas Damim. Atyu kanita king marangle da ring sebada inyang tinakas la ding Israelita. 
1Chronicles11:14 Kanita linage ya i Eleazar libutad na ning marangle at lebanan na la ding Filisteo at apate na la. Dininan neng maragul a tagumpe ning Ginu. 
1Chronicles11:15 Misan a aldo, inyang migkampu la ding Filisteo king Kapatagan ning Refaim, ding atlu karing atlung pulung manimuna da ring sundalus na ning Israel minta la keting batung maragul nung nukarin ya karin i David lele ning Kueba ning Adulam." 
1Chronicles11:16 Atyu kanita i David king metung a kuta, at asakup na ne ning metung dang grupu ding Filisteo ing Betlehem." 
1Chronicles11:17 King kasabikan nang David asabi na ing anti kaniti: Sana makainum ku king danum a ibat king talaga lele ning pasbul dalan ning Betlehem! 
1Chronicles11:18 Kanita ginawa lang paralan ding atlung matapang nang sundalus ba lang milub king kampu da ring Filisteo. At menikua lang danum king talaga lele ning pasbul dalan ning Betlehem. Binie ra iti kang David, oneng e na ininum nune bilus na iti bilang ain king Ginu." 
1Chronicles11:19 Nganang David, E ku ainum iti, uling anti ku nang ininum ing daya da reting lalaking teya ra ing bie ra! Inya e na ininum. Makanyan mekilala ing depat dang katapatan ding atlung matapang a sundalus nang David." 
1Chronicles11:20 I Abisai a kapatad nang Joab ya ing manimuna da ring Atlung Pulu. Ya ing mekilaban karing atlung dalan a kalaban at apate na la ngan king uli na ning tandus na. Meging pikabaluan ya karing Atlung Pulu a panimunan na. 
1Chronicles11:21 Ya ing pikabaluan kareting Atlung Pulu at ya ing meging manimuna da, oneng e ya lubus pikabaluan a antimo ding Atlu." 
1Chronicles11:22 Pikabaluan ya namang sundalus i Benaia a anak nang Jeoiada ning Kabzeel. Dakal ya depat a katapangan. Ya ing mekapate karing aduang matapang nang sundalus ning Moab. Misan a aldo a mumuran yelu, dinulung ya king metung a kulkul a malalam at pete ne ing leon." 
1Chronicles11:23 Ya munaman ing mekapate king metung a lalaking maragul a tau Ehipto a pitu at kapitnang talampakan king katas, at atin yang maragul a tandus. Atin yang palupalu i Benaia at delusungan ne iting lalaki, at ikua neng asamsam ing tandus na niting tau Ehipto. Kaybat pete ne king tandus na." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ila deti ring depat nang katapangan Benaia, ing metung karing pikabaluan a Atlung Pulu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Maygit ya karela ngan, mu pin e ya maygit pikabaluan karing Atlu. Ya ing gewa nang David a mamahala karing sundalung guardia na." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ila deti ring aliwa na pang matapang a sundalus David: i Asael a kapatad nang Joab, at i Elhanan a anak nang Dodo ning Betlehem," 
1Chronicles11:27 i Samot ning Harod, at i Helez ning Pelet," 
1Chronicles11:28 i Ira a anak nang Ikes ning Tekoa, at i Abiezer ning Anatot," 
1Chronicles11:29 i Sibecai ning Husa, at i Ilai ning Aho," 
1Chronicles11:30 i Maharai ning Netofa, at i Heled a anak nang Baana a tau munaman Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 i Itai a anak nang Ribai ning Gibea ning Benjamin, at i Benaia ning Piraton," 
1Chronicles11:32 i Hurai da ring kapatagan ning Gaas, at i Abiel ning Arba," 
1Chronicles11:33 i Azmavet ning Bahurum, at i Eliaba ning Saalbon," 
1Chronicles11:34 i Hasem ning Gizon, at i Jonatan a anak nang Sage ning Arar," 
1Chronicles11:35 i Ahiam a anak nang Sakar a tau munaman king Arar at i Elifal a anak nang Ur," 
1Chronicles11:36 i Hefer ning Mekera, at i Ahiya ning Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:37 i Hezro ning Carmel, at i Naarai a anak nang Ezbai," 
1Chronicles11:38 i Joel a kapatad nang Natan, at i Mibhar a anak nang Hagri," 
1Chronicles11:38 i Joel a kapatad nang Natan, at i Mibhar a anak nang Hagri," 
1Chronicles11:39 i Zelek ning Ammon, i Naarai ning Beerot a talapagdala nang armas Joab a anak nang Zeruia," 
1Chronicles11:40 i Ira at i Gareb ning Jatir," 
1Chronicles11:41 i Uria a Hiteo, at i Zabad a anak nang Ahlai," 
1Chronicles11:42 i Adina a anak nang Siza a manimuna na ning lahi nang Ruben at ating sariling atlung pulung tauan," 
1Chronicles11:43 i Hanan a anak nang Maaca, at i Josafat ning Mitan," 
1Chronicles11:44 i Uzia ning Astera, at di Samma at Jeiel, ding anak nang Hotam ning Aroer," 
1Chronicles11:45 i Jediael at i Joha, ding anak nang Simri ning Tiz," 
1Chronicles11:46 i Eliel ning Mahava, at di Jeribai at Josavia, ding anak nang Elnaam, i Itma ning Moab," 
1Chronicles11:47 i Eliel, Obed, at i Jaasiel a tau Zoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ating lalaking minta kang David inyang atyu ya king Ziklag; kanitang sasalikut ya kang Aring Saul a anak nang Kis. Mekiabe la kang David deting lalaki a masibukan at pikabaluan king gelingan king pamakilaban. 
1Chronicles12:2 Atin lang pana at paslu ampon tiradol. Kayli at wanan lang mamana o maniradol. Ibat la king lahi nang Benjamin nung nu ya kabilang i Saul. Ila deti: 
1Chronicles12:3 i Ahiezer, ing manimuna, at i Joas, ing kaduang manimuna. Anak na lang Semaa ning Gibea. Di Jeziel at Pelet a anak nang Azmavet; i Beraka, at i Jehu a tau Anatot," 
1Chronicles12:4 i Ismaia ning Gibeon, ing metung karing sundalus at metung karing manimuna da ring Atlung Pulu; i Jeremias, Jahaziel, Johanan, at i Jozabad a tau Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:5 i Eluzai, Jerimot, Bealia, Semaria, at i Sefatia a tau Harif;" 
1Chronicles12:6 i Elkana, Issia, Azarel, Joezer, at i Jasobeam na ning pamilya nang Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 i Joela at Zebadia a anak nang Jeroham ning Gedor. 
1Chronicles12:7 i Joela at Zebadia a anak nang Jeroham ning Gedor. 
1Chronicles12:8 Atin munaman masibukan at pikabaluan a sundalus a ibat king tribu nang Gad a mekiabe kang David inyang atyu ya king kuta na king ilang. Biasa la ngang gumamit kalasag at tandus, mabagsik la ngang anti ding leon at maliksing anti ding usa king bunduk." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ila deti, agpang king pamitukituki ning karelang katungkulan: Ezer, ing pamuntuk da, Obadias, Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mismana, Jeremias," 
1Chronicles12:11 Atai, Eliel," 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanan, Elzabad," 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremias, at i Makbanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Opisyal la deting mesabing lalaki karing tia dinalan o tia libung sundalus. 
1Chronicles12:15 Ila ding dinalakit king Ilug ning Jordan inyang miglapo ya king mumunang bulan na ning banua, at iti ing meging sangkan ning pamaglako da ring taung manuknangan karing kapatagan banda aslagan at albugan." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ating karing lahi nang Benjamin at Juda ing minta king kuta nung nu ya karin i David. 
1Chronicles12:17 Linual ya i David ba na lang saganan. Ngana karela, Malaus kayu, nung dinatang kayu bilang kakaluguran a sumaup kanaku. Makiabe kayu kekami! Nung ing buri yu ya ing panganiaya yu ku karing kanakung kalaban, agyang ala kung gewang e ustu kekayu, makanyan man abalu na iti ning Dios da ring kekatamung makatua at ya ing bala kekayu." 
1Chronicles12:18 Kanita ing upaya na ning Dios linub ya kang Amasai, ing metung kareti. I Amasai ya ing meging pekapun da ring Atlung Pulu, at nganang migsalita: David anak nang Jese, kakampi mu kami! Kapayapan keka, kapayapan munaman karing kekang katambayan! Uling ing Dios saupan na ka. Tinggap na lang matulang David at gewa na lang opisyal da ring sundalus na." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ating mapilan a sundalus na ning tribu nang Manase ding mekiabe kang David inyang kayabe na lang linual ding Filisteo ban labanan ya i Aring Saul. E na la sinaupan David ding Filisteo, uling e la tiwala ding ari da ring Filisteo. Pepalakuan de i David at ngara king metung at metung, Mibili mu king panganib ing bie tamu king taung yan, uling makapanig ya pa mu rin king panginuan nang i Saul." 
1Chronicles12:20 Inyang mekapagbalik ne i David king Ziklag, kanita la dinatang ding sundalus a ibat king tribu nang Manase at mekiabe la kang David. Ila deti: Adna, Jozabad, Jediael, Mikael, Jozabad, Elihu, at i Ziletai. Pekapun la at atin yang metung a libung sundalus ing balang metung karela." 
1Chronicles12:21 Seupan de i David at ding sundalus na. Ila ding meging opisyal da ring sundalus nang David uling masibukan la king pamakilaban. 
1Chronicles12:22 Daratang la aldo-aldo ding lalaki ban makiabe la at saupan ya i David. Uli na niti, mika marakal yang sundalus a pakasandata i David." 
1Chronicles12:23 Oyni ing bilang da ring sundalus a minta kang David king Hebron ban ilipat da ing panga-ari nang Saul, agpang king pengaku ning Ginu:" 
1Chronicles12:24 ding king lahi nang Juda, anam lang libu walung dalan. Magdala la ngang sibat at kalasag." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ding king lahi nang Simeon, pitu lang libu at dinalan. Pikabaluan la ngan king tepangan at sikanan." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ding king lahi nang Levi, apat lang libu at anam a ralan." 
1Chronicles12:27 Ding king lahi nang Aaron a panimunan nang Jeoiada, atlu lang libu at pitung dalan;" 
1Chronicles12:28 kayabe ya kareti ing pikabaluan a matapang a kayanakan a i Zadok at ding aduang pulu't aduang manimuna na ning karelang pamilya. 
1Chronicles12:29 Ding king lahi nang Benjamin, king pamilya nang Saul, atlu lang libu agyang tapat la pa mu rin kang Saul ding keraklan karing pamilya ra." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ding king lahi nang Efraim, adua lang pulung libu walung dalan a mangatapang at pikabaluan karing karelang lahi." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ding king tribu nang Manase dane Albugan, labi lang walung libu ding pepapuntan da ban gawan yang ari i David." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ding king lahi nang Isacar, adua lang dalan ding manimuna a kayabe da ring pamilyang karelang panimunan. Balu da lang dinan kabaldugan ding panaun at biasang gawang lakbang a gawan na ning bansang Israel." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ding king lahi nang Zebulun, lima lang pulung libung masibukan a sundalus at tapat ampon makasadiang makilaban nanumang oras. Biasa lang gumamit nanumang sandata ban asaupan de i David." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ding king lahi nang Neftali, libu la ding manimuna subali pa karetang atlung pulu't pitung libung sundalus a ating kalasag at tandus." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ding king lahi nang Dan, adua lang pulu't walung libu at anam a ralan a sundalus a pakasandata at makasadiang makilaban nanumang oras." 
1Chronicles12:36 Ding king lahi nang Aser, apat lang pulung libu a makasadiang makilaban nanumang oras." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ding king lahi da ri Ruben, Gad, at ing tribu nang Manase dane Aslagan sumangid na ning Ilug ning Jordan, dinalan aduang pulung libu la a ating miyayaliwang uring sandata." 
1Chronicles12:38 Makasadia la ngang makilaban nanumang oras deting sundalus, at metung mu ing karelang buri inyang minta la king Hebronya pin ing gawan yang ari ning Israel i David. Makanyan ing panamdam da ring aliwang Israelita." 
1Chronicles12:39 Kayabe de i David kilub ding atlung aldo; mamangan la at miminum king sidia da ring karelang kabalen para karela. 
1Chronicles12:40 Pepadala lang pamangan pati ding atyu karing marayung lugal a antimo ding kang Isacar, Zebulun, at Neftali. Makasake karing asno, kamelyu, mula, at baka ing miyayaliwang darala dang pamangan: arina, higos, pasas, alak, larung olibo, baka, at tupa. Iti ngan ya ing tanda ning tula na ning mabilug a bansang Israel." 
1Chronicles13:1 Sinanggunian na lang David ding opisyal da ring tia libu at tia dinalan a sundalus. 
1Chronicles13:2 Kaybat, nganang sinabi karing sablang Israelitang atyu karin, Nung paintulut yu at nung kaburian na ning Ginung kekatamung Dios, mitubud tamung tau ban agkatan la ngang mitipun keti ding kabalen tamung alayu keti at pati na ding pari at Levitang manuknangan karing karelang siudad at baryu." 
1Chronicles13:3 Kanita abe-abe ta yang kuanan ing Kaban ning Dios a mekalinguan inyang i Saul ya ing ari. 
1Chronicles13:4 Metula la ding memalen kaniting munikala at pemayapan de. 
1Chronicles13:5 Inya tinipun na lang David ding Israelita manibat king Sihor ning Ehipto angga king Pidadalanan ning Hamat ban kuanan ya king Kiriat Jearim ing Kaban ning Dios at kaybat idala ya king Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles13:6 Minta ya i David at ding memalen king siudad na ning Baala a alang aliwa nune ing Kiriat Jearim king sakup ning Juda ban kuanan ya ing Kaban ning Dios nung nu ya atyu ing lagyu na ning Ginung makatronu babo da ring kerubin. 
1Chronicles13:7 Ibat king bale nang Abinadab, linual de ing Kaban ning Dios at seke re king bayung karitun. Ding pakuliut king karitun ila di Uzza at Ahio" 
1Chronicles13:8 kabang i David at ding sablang memalen teterak lang alang tuknang ban parangalan ya ing Dios. Migkanta la at tinigtig da la ring karelang lira, alpa, tambul, pompiang, at trumpeta." 
1Chronicles13:9 Inyang malapit na la king lugal a pidadaran nang Tsidon, mitisud la ding bakang kukuliut king karitun, inya telan neng Uzza ing Kaban." 
1Chronicles13:10 Kanita mu rin mimua ya kang Uzza ing Ginu at pete ne karin uling telan ne ing Kaban. 
1Chronicles13:11 Iti ing sangkan nung inya manibat na kanita inaus deng Perez Uzza ing lugal a ita. Tutu yang meligalig i David kaniting milyari kang Uzza. 
1Chronicles13:12 Mitakutan ya i David king Dios. Ngana, Makananu ke ngening iyuli ing Kaban ning Dios?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Inya e na ne delang David ing Kaban king Jerusalem. Likuan na nia mu ing Kaban king bale na ning taung milagyuan Obed Edom ning Gat. 
1Chronicles13:14 Menatili ya karin ing Kaban ning Dios kilub ding atlung bulan, at binendisyunan ne ning Ginu ing pamilya nang Obed Edom at ing sablang atyu keya." 
1Chronicles14:1 Mitubud yang tau i Aring Hiram kang David; peparala ya namang tablang sedro, manabas batu ampon kalpinteru ban gawan de ing palasyu nang David." 
1Chronicles14:2 Kanita na akilalang David king kaburian na ning Ginu ing pamaging ari na king Israel, at mibendisyunan ya ing kayarian king uli da ring memalen na ning Israel." 
1Chronicles14:3 Mekiasawa ya pa i David karing babai na ning Jerusalem at mikayanak yang dakal. 
1Chronicles14:4 Ila deti ring anak na: i Samua, Sobab, Natan, Solomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibhar, Elisua, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefeg, Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama, Beeliada, at i Elifelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Abalitan da ring Filisteo king i David ya na ing mag-ari king mabilug a Israel. Inya miyabe-abe la ba reng bihagan. Abalitan nang David iti at linual ya ba na lang labanan. 
1Chronicles14:9 Miras la ding Filisteo king Kapatagan ning Refaim at lisuban de. 
1Chronicles14:10 Nganang mengutang David king Dios, Labanan ku la o ali ku la ding Filisteo? Nung labanan ku la, papagtagumpen yu ku kaya karela? Nganang mekibat ning Ginu, Wa, labanan mu la at papagtagumpen da ka!" 
1Chronicles14:11 Inya lisuban na lang David ding Filisteong atyu king Baal Perazim at simbut na la. Nganang David, Ginamit na kung anting kasangkapan ning Dios ban payagusan lang anting danum ding kakung kalaban. Inya meyaus yang Baal Perazim ing lugal a ita." 
1Chronicles14:12 Inyang tinakas la ding Filisteo likuan da la ring kikilalanan dang dios, at pepasilab na la ngang David deti." 
1Chronicles14:13 Pasibayu lang linusub king kapatagan ding Filisteo. 
1Chronicles14:14 Inya mengutang yang pasibayu i David king Dios. Nganang mekibat ning Dios, E mo lulusuban keti, nune dumurut ka at king kagulutan mu la salakayan, lele da ring tanaman a balsamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Potang damdaman mu na ing kaluskus babo da ring tanaman kanita mu la lusuban, uling muna ku kekang salake ba lang masambut ding Filisteo." 
1Chronicles14:16 Memintu ya i David ketang inutus na ning Dios, at simbut na la ding Filisteo manibat king Gibeon angga king Gezer." 
1Chronicles14:17 Mikalat karing sablang bansa ing kabantugan nang David, at mitakutan la kang David uli na ning Ginu." 
1Chronicles15:1 Pepagawa yang dakal nang bale i David karin king Siudad nang David. Pepasadia nia naman ing metung a lugal para king Kaban ning Dios at pepatalakad yang tolda para kaniti. 
1Chronicles15:2 Sinabi na, Bukud mung ding Levita ilang malyaring magdala king Kaban ning Dios, uling ila ding pinili na ning Ginu ban magdala kaniti at sumuyu king kapilan pa man." 
1Chronicles15:3 Kanita pepayaus na la ngang David ding sablang memalen na ning Israel a mitipun king Jerusalem ban idala ya ing Kaban ning Ginu ketang lugal a sidia na para kaniti. 
1Chronicles15:4 Kaybat na nita, peparakit na la ding lahi nang Aaron at ding Levita." 
1Chronicles15:5 Ibat king lahi nang Kohat a anak nang Levi, dinatang ya i Uriel a mamahala karing dinalan aduang pulung miembru na ning pamilya na." 
1Chronicles15:6 King pamilya nang Merari, dinatang ya i Asaia a mamahala karing aduang dalan aduang pulung katau." 
1Chronicles15:7 King pamilya nang Gerson, dinatang ya i Joel a mamahala karing dinalan atlung pulung katau." 
1Chronicles15:7 King pamilya nang Gerson, dinatang ya i Joel a mamahala karing dinalan atlung pulung katau." 
1Chronicles15:8 King pamilya nang Elizafan, dinatang ya i Semaia a mamahala karing aduang dalan a katau." 
1Chronicles15:9 King pamilya nang Hebron, dinatang ya i Eliel a mamahala karing walung pulung katau." 
1Chronicles15:10 At king pamilya nang Uzziel, dinatang ya i Aminadab a mamahala karing dinalan labing aduang tau." 
1Chronicles15:11 Pepayaus na lang David ding paring i Zadok at i Abiatar ampon ding Levitang i Uriel, Asaia, Joel, Semaia, Eliel, at i Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:11 Pepayaus na lang David ding paring i Zadok at i Abiatar ampon ding Levitang i Uriel, Asaia, Joel, Semaia, Eliel, at i Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:12 Ngana karing Levita, Ikayu ding manimuna da ring pamilyang Levita. Pakalinisan yu ing sarili yu at antimu rin ding kalupa yung Levita ba yeng idala ing Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginung Dios ning Israel ketang lugal a pepasadia ku." 
1Chronicles15:13 Uling e kayu kayabe kanitang dela mi ya ing Kaban ning Kasunduan, mimua ya ing Ginung kekatamung Dios, uling simban mi ya ing Dios king paralan a e karapatdapat." 
1Chronicles15:14 Inya pekalinis da ring pari at Levita ing karelang sarili ba reng idala ing Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginung Dios ning Israel. 
1Chronicles15:15 Pisanan de iti king kapamilatan da ring tambayuk, agpang king inutus na ning Ginu kang Moises." 
1Chronicles15:16 Inutus na namang David karing manimuna da ring Levita ing mamili la karing kayabe ra a biasang magkanta at tigtig masikan karing instrumentong musika antimo ding alpa, lira, at pompiang." 
1Chronicles15:17 Inya pinili de i Heman a anak nang Joel, i Asaf a anak nang Berekia; king pamilya nang Merari, i Etan a anak nang Kusaia." 
1Chronicles15:17 Inya pinili de i Heman a anak nang Joel, i Asaf a anak nang Berekia; king pamilya nang Merari, i Etan a anak nang Kusaia." 
1Chronicles15:18 Para magkanta at manigtigan, pinili da la ri Zacarias, Jaaziel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, Eliab, Benaia, Maaseia, Matitia, Elifelehu, Mikneia, di Obed Edom at Jeiel, ding guardia karing pasbul dalan." 
1Chronicles15:19 Pinili da la ri Heman, Asaf, at i Etan ban ila ring tigtig karing tangsung pompiang." 
1Chronicles15:20 Ding tigtig karing instrumentong babage karing salteryu ila ri Zacarias, Jaaziel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, Eliab, Maaseia, at i Benaia." 
1Chronicles15:21 Ding tigtig karing lira ila di Matitia, Elifelehu, Mikneia, Obed Edom, Jeiel, at i Azazia." 
1Chronicles15:22 Ing kumpas karing talapagkanta ya i Kenania, ing manibala karing Levita, uling biasa ya." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ding magbante king pasbul ning Kaban ila di Berekia at Elkana. 
1Chronicles15:24 Ding tumiup karing trumpeta arap ning Kaban ning Dios ila ding paring di Sebania, Josafat, Netanel, Amasai, Zacarias, Benaia, Eliezer. I Obed Edom at i Jehia ila ding mepili ban magbante king Kaban ning Kasunduan; kayabe da la ri Berekia at Elkana." 
1Chronicles15:25 Inya minta yang masayang-masaya i David at ding manimuna ning Israel ampon ding manimuna da ring libu-libung sundalus king bale nang Obed Edom ban kuanan ya ing Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginu. 
1Chronicles15:26 Miyain lang pitung toro at pitung tupang lalaki ban saupan na la ning Dios ding Levitang magdala king Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginu. 
1Chronicles15:27 Makasulud yang imalan a megawa king masanting diling linen i David, at antimu rin ding talapagkanta, i Kenania a manimuna da, at ding Levitang magdala king Kaban. Susulud nia namang David itang efod a megawa king telang linen." 
1Chronicles15:28 Kayabe la ngan ding sablang Israelita inyang milipat ya ing Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginu king Jerusalem. Kukulisak la ngan king tula at titigtigan da la ring trumpeta, tambuli, pompiang, alpa, at lira." 
1Chronicles15:29 Tinando ya king awang i Mikal, ing babaing anak nang Saul, kabang lulub de king siudad ing Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginu, at ikit neng teterak at lundag-lundag king tula i David. Kesaman ne i David kilub ning pusu na." 
1Chronicles16:1 Dela re ing Kaban ning Dios ketang toldang pepasadia nang David at linub de. Kaybat, minie lang ain-a-durulukan at ain-ning-pamisulusulu para king Dios." 
1Chronicles16:2 Inyang ayari na nang David ing pamanain karing ain-sakripisyu, binendisyunan na la ding tau king lagyu na ning Ginu," 
1Chronicles16:3 at dininan na la ngang pamangan. Dininan neng tinape at kapirasung karning ningnang ampon pasas ing balang metung a lalaki at babaing Israelita. 
1Chronicles16:4 Tilduan na lang David ding mapilan karing Levita ban manimuna arap ning Kaban ning Ginu king pamaniamba, pamagkanta, at pamamie kapasalamatan king Ginu, ing Dios ning Israel." 
1Chronicles16:5 Mitulduan yang manimuna i Asaf at meging kasaup na la di Zacarias, Jeiel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Matitia, Eliab, Benaia, Obed Edom, at i Jeiel. Ila ding tigtig karing alpa at lira. I Asaf ya ing tigtig karing pompiang." 
1Chronicles16:6 Pari la ding tumiup karing trumpeta aldo-aldo king arap ning Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Dios. Ding pari ila di Benaia at Jahaziel. 
1Chronicles16:7 Kanitang aldong ita na penibalang David kang Asaf at karing kayabe na ing katungkulan da king pamagkantang kapasalamatan king Ginu. 
1Chronicles16:8 Munie kayung kapasalamatan king Ginu, maus kayu king lagyu na; sablang depat na karing tau sabian yu." 
1Chronicles16:9 Magkanta kayu king Ginu, pagkanta yeng kapurian; ibalita ing makapagmulala nang depat." 
1Chronicles16:10 Tumula kayu uli na ning banal nang lagyu; paburen lang tumula ding sasamba king Dios! 
1Chronicles16:11 Panintunan ye ing Ginu at ing kayupayan na; ing pamanintun king Ginu e yu sana kakalinguan. 
1Chronicles16:12 E yu la sana kakalinguan ding milagrung depat na, at ding sinabi nang kayatulan," 
1Chronicles16:13 O lahi nang Abraham a talasuyu na, O anak nang Jacob a pinili na ning Ginu." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ing Ginu ya ing kekatamung Dios, ding kautusan na para king mabilug a yatu la." 
1Chronicles16:15 E ne kakalinguan dit' man ing kasunduan na, ing pangaku na karing libu-libung lahi na." 
1Chronicles16:16 Ing kasunduan a gewa na kang Abraham, ing pangaku na kang Isaac, deti tuparan na la ngan." 
1Chronicles16:17 Ginawa yang kasunduan ing Ginu kang Jacob, kasunduan yang manatili kapilan man." 
1Chronicles16:18 Ngana, Keka ibie ke ing gabun ning Canaan bilang mana a kekang pibandian." 
1Chronicles16:19 Kanitang panaun a ita inyang tutu lang ditak pa; dayuan la ngan karin king Canaan. 
1Chronicles16:20 Karing miyayaliwang bansa at kayarian miglipat-lipat la. 
1Chronicles16:21 E na la pepaburen ma-ipus kaninu man, alang-alang karela ding ari belan na la." 
1Chronicles16:22 Ngana, Ding pinili ku e yu la nananan, ding propeta ku e yu la panasakitan." 
1Chronicles16:23 Magkanta kayu king Ginu! Magkanta ka king Ginu, O meto yatu! Isalita yu aldo-aldo ing pamagligtas na kekatamu!" 
1Chronicles16:24 Ing kayupayan na karing bansa sabian yu, at ding makapagmulalang dapat na karing sablang tau." 
1Chronicles16:25 Uling ing Ginu maula ya; sukat yang purian, sukat yang galangan maygit karing aliwang dios." 
1Chronicles16:26 Rebultu la mu ding dios-diosan da ring paganu; oneng ing linalang karing banua ya ing Ginu. 
1Chronicles16:27 Makapadurut ing ligaya ampon ing kamalan na; kayupayan at tula ing atyu king tuknangan na. 
1Chronicles16:28 Purian ya ing Ginu, ikong sablang tau keting yatu, purian ye ing ligaya na at kayupayan!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Purian ya ing maligaya nang lagyu; malaus kayu king bale na at ain ibie keya. King banal a gayak samban ya ing Ginu. 
1Chronicles16:30 Galgal ka arapan na, O meto yatu. Wa, ing yatu matatag ya at e ya maugun king kabilian na." 
1Chronicles16:31 Paburen yang tumula ing banua; paburen ing yatu magsaya ya, at pati na ing dagat ampon ing sablang atyu king Ginu; sabian karing bansa king ing Ginu ari ya!" 
1Chronicles16:32 Paburen yang mainge ing dagat, at ing sablang atyu keting dagat; paburen yung ding marangle at ding sablang tanam da tumula la." 
1Chronicles16:33 Kanita ding sablang tanaman ning kagubatan magkanta lang matula arap ning Ginu potang datang ya ban ukuman neng yatu. 
1Chronicles16:34 Munie kayung kapasalamatan king Ginu, uling mayap ya; ing lugud nang e kukupas manatili kapilan man." 
1Chronicles16:35 Sabian king Ginu, Iligtas mu kami, O Dios a kekeng Talapagligtas; ibat karing miyayaliwang bansa tipunan mu kami ban pasalamatan mi ya ing lagyu mung banal at manakit kaligayan king pamamie kekang kapurian." 
1Chronicles16:36 Ing Ginu, ing Dios ning Israel ya ing purian; purian ye ngeni at king kapilan man! Ngarang mekibat ding tau, Amen. Kaybat na nita, pinuri de ing Ginu." 
1Chronicles16:37 I Asaf at ding kalupa nang Levita ila ding tilduan nang David mangasiwa king aldo-aldo pamanyamba ketang lugal ning Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginu. 
1Chronicles16:38 Ding kasaup da ila di Obed Edom, ing anak nang Jedutun ampon ding anam apulu't walung katau king pamilya na. I Obed Edom at i Hosa ila ding ating pakibatan karing pasbul dalan." 
1Chronicles16:39 I Zadok at ding kayabe nang pari ila naman ding ating pakibatan king kasuyuan pamanyamba king Ginu ketang matas a lugal ning Gibeon. 
1Chronicles16:40 Minie lang ain-a-durulukan king altar neng abak at neng bengi, agpang ketang makasulat king Kautusan ning Ginu a binie na king Israel." 
1Chronicles16:41 Kasaup da la karin di Heman at Jedutun ampon ding aliwa pang mepili ban magkantang kapasalamatan king Ginu uli na ning alang angga nang lugud. 
1Chronicles16:42 Ding ating pakibatan karing trumpeta at pompiang ampon aliwa pang intrumentong musikang titigtigan neng magkantang kapasalamatan ila naman di Heman at Jedutun. Ding pamilya nang Jedutun ila ding ating pakibatan king pamag-guardia karing pasbul dalan. 
1Chronicles16:43 Kaybat na nita, minuli la ding tau. Minuli ya naman i David ba neng akayabe ing pamilya na." 
1Chronicles17:1 Nganang Aring David kang propeta Natan inyang makatuknang ne king palasyu na, Manuknangan ku king palasyung megawa king dutung a sedro samantalang ing Kaban ning Kasunduan ning Ginu atyu king tolda." 
1Chronicles17:2 Nganang Natan, Gawan mu itang isipan mung mayap uling ing Dios atyu keka." 
1Chronicles17:3 King bengi mu ring ita pekisabian ne ning Ginu i Natan. 
1Chronicles17:4 Ngana, Natan, puntalan me ing talasuyu kung i David at sabian mu king aliwa ya ing patalakad king bale a pituknangan ku." 
1Chronicles17:5 E ku pa menuknangan king metung a bale manibat na kanitang linual ke ing Israel king Ehipto; menuknangan ku king tolda a pilipat-lipat da karing miyayaliwang lugal. 
1Chronicles17:6 King kanakung pamaglakbe kayabe da ring Israelita, ala kung kitnan metung man karing manimuna da nung inya e ra ku pepatalakad bale gewa king dutung a sedro." 
1Chronicles17:7 Inya sabian mu ing anti kaniti king talasuyu kung i David, king aku, ing Ginung Mayupaya: Leko da ka king pamagpastul mung tupa ban gawan pamuntuk na ning balen kung Israel." 
1Chronicles17:8 Pitnubayan da ka nu ka man minta, at simbut ku la ngan ding kekang kalaban king kekang panyulung. Gawan da kang pikabaluan a pamuntuk karing sablang manimuna ning yatu." 
1Chronicles17:9 Dinan keng sarili nang gabun ing Israel, at ibili ku la karin ban e ne misakitan o maligalig pa karing e mayap a tau" 
1Chronicles17:10 antimo ing milyari manibat na kanitang memili kung talapanimuna na. Pasukuan ku la ding sabla mung kalaban. Ipatalakad da kang metung a lahi. 
1Chronicles17:11 Potang mate ka at mikutkut king kutkutan da ring kekang makatua, gawan keng ari ing metung karing anak mu at gawan keng matatag ing kayarian na." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ya ing pagawa king bale para kanaku, at papanatilian ku ne man ing kayarian na king kapilan pa man." 
1Chronicles17:13 Aku ing maging tata na at ya ing maging anak ku. Likuan ke i Saul, oneng ya e ke lakuan. Wa, leko ke i Saul ban ika ing maging ari." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ya ing papamahalan ku karing memalen ku at king kanakung kayarian king kapilan pa man. Ala yang kapupusan ing kayarian na. 
1Chronicles17:15 Sinabi na ngang Natan kang David ing sablang sinabi na ning Dios. 
1Chronicles17:16 Kanita linub ya i Aring David king Toldang tuknangan ning Ginu at linukluk ya. Kaybat nganang migsalita, O Ginung Dios, ninu mo aku at ing pamilya ku ban pagmalasakitan mu?" 
1Chronicles17:17 At balamu malati pang bage iti king akakit mu, O Ginung Dios. Binggitan mu munaman ing tungkul king mayap nang panaun a daratang ning pamilya ku." 
1Chronicles17:18 Nanu pa mo ing sabian ku keka? Lubus mu kung balu, makanyan man parangalan mu ku, ing kekang talasuyu." 
1Chronicles17:19 Para king kanakung kapakanan, aku a maluka mung talasuyu, at agpang king kekang kaburian, depatan mu ngan iting mangaragul a bage at pepakit ing dangalan ku king daratang a panaun." 
1Chronicles17:20 O Ginu, ala kang kalupa; malambat mi nang balu king alang Dios subali mu ika." 
1Chronicles17:21 Alang aliwang bansa keti king yatu a kalupa na ning Israel a linigtas mu king panga-ipus ban gawan meng sarili mung balen. Meging pikabaluan ka king mabilug a yatu uli na ning maragul at makapagmulalang dapat a gewa mu para karela. Linigtas mu la ding memalen mu king Ehipto at tinabi ding paganung disnan da. 
1Chronicles17:22 O Ginu, gewa mu lang sarili mung memalen ding Israelita king kapilan pa man, at ika naman ing meging Dios da." 
1Chronicles17:23 Ngeni, O Ginung Dios, tuparan mu king sablang panaun ing pengaku mu kanaku at karing kanakung lahi, at daptan mu itang sinabi mu." 
1Chronicles17:24 King anti kaniting paralan ya mirangal ing lagyu mu, at sabian da ring tau, Ing Ginung Mayupaya ya ing Dios ning Israel. At maging matatag ya king arapan mu ing pamilya na ning kekang talasuyu king kapilan pa man." 
1Chronicles17:25 Ika mu rin, O kanakung Dios, ing sinabi king gawan meng matatag ing pamilya ku, ing kekang talasuyu. Iti ing sangkan nung inya atin kung sikanan lub manalangin keka." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ika, Ginu, ing Dios, at ika ing mengaku a daptan mu la kanaku a talasuyu mu deting mayap a bage." 
1Chronicles17:27 Inya bendisyunan me ing pamilya ku ba nang parating tatakman ing kekang kayapan. Ika, Ginu, ing mamendisyun karela at manatili ing kekang bendisyun karela king kapilan pa man." 
1Chronicles18:1 Kalabas da ring mapilan a panaun, lisuban na lang pasibayung David ding Filisteo, at simbut na la. Sekupan ne ing siudad ning Gat at ding baryung makapadurut kaniti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Simbut na la naman ding Moabita at meging ipus na la at memayad lang buis. 
1Chronicles18:3 Kaybat, lisuban neng David i Aring Hadadezer ning Zoba ning Siria malapit king sakup ning Hamat, uling buri neng pasibayung sakupan i Hadadezer ing matas nang dake ning Ilug ning Eufrates." 
1Chronicles18:4 Ikua na la namang David ding libung karung panggera, at abihag ding pitung libung sundalung pakasake kabayu, at ding aduang pulung libung sundalung e pakasake kabayu. Memili yang kabayu para karing dinalan a karung panggera na, at kaybat pemile na la ring mitagan." 
1Chronicles18:5 Inyang parala lang sundalus ding tau Siria ning Damasco ba reng saupan i Aring Hadadezer, inarapan na lang David at pete na la ding aduang pulu't aduang libung sundalus." 
1Chronicles18:6 Kaybat na nita, pepatalakad yang kampu na king sakup da at meging ipus na la at mamayad lang buis. Papagtagumpen ne ning Ginu i David nu ya man munta." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dela na lang David king Jerusalem ding gintung kalasag a ikua na karing opisyal nang Hadadezer. 
1Chronicles18:8 Dakal ya naman ikuang tangsu king Tibhat at Kun, ding siudad a sakup nang Hadadezer. (Iti ing tangsung ginamit nang Solomon inyang pagawa yang kawa, asias, at aliwa pang kasangkapan para king bale ning Dios.)" 
1Chronicles18:9 Abalitan nang Aring Toi ning Hamat king simbut na lang David ding sundalus nang Hadadezer. 
1Chronicles18:10 Inya tinubud ne ing anak nang i Joram ba neng dinan mayap a oras i Aring David uling simbut ne i Hadadezer a akalaban na namang Toi king dakal a pamakilaban. Migdala yang regalung megawa king gintu, pilak, at tangsu i Joram para kang David." 
1Chronicles18:11 Telaga na lang David deti para gamitan king pamanyamba at ding pilak at gintung ikua na karing bansang simbut na antimo ing Edom, Moab, Ammon, Filistia, at ing Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 I Abisai a anak nang Zeruia mekapate yang labing walung libung tau Edom king Kapatagan ning Asin. 
1Chronicles18:13 Mitalakad yang kampu na king mabilug a sakup ning Edom, at meging sakup na lang Aring David ding memalen karin. Papagtagumpen ne ning Ginu i David nu ya man munta." 
1Chronicles18:14 Mig-ari ya i David king mabilug a Israel, at pepatupad na ing hustisia at ing katuliran na ning metung at metung karing memalen na." 
1Chronicles18:15 I Joab a anak nang Zeruia ya ing gewa nang pekapun da ring sablang sundalus na; i Jeosafat a anak nang Ahilud ya ing gewa nang talaingat karing listahan; 
1Chronicles18:16 i Zadok a anak nang Ahitub at i Ahimelek a anak nang Abiatar ila ring tilduan nang pari; i Seraia ya ing kalihim; 
1Chronicles18:17 i Benaia a anak nang Jeoiada ya ing pekapun da ring Kereteo at Peleteo a pansarili nang guardiang David; at matas la katungkulan ding sablang anak nang Aring David. 
1Chronicles19:1 Kalabas na ning mapilan a panaun, mete ya i Nahas a ari na ning Ammon. Ing anak nang i Hanun ya ing menalili bilang ari." 
1Chronicles19:2 Nganang David, Kailangan ku namang makipagkaluguran kang Aring Hanun uling meging maganaka ya kanaku i tata na. Inya peparala yang mapilan a tubud i David ban ipayabut kang Aring Hanun ing pamakirame na. Inyang miras na la ring tubud," 
1Chronicles19:3 ngara ding manimuna na ning Ammon kang Aring Hanun, Pota isipan yu king pepadala na lang David deting tubud ban makirame kekayu king pangamate nang tata yo? Agyang ditak ali la! Dinatang la ren ba reng ispian ing bansa tamu at kaybat lusuban neng David." 
1Chronicles19:4 Inya peparakap na lang Hanun ding tubud nang David at pepalabahas ding balbas da ampon pinutut anggang awakan ing susulud dang imalan. Kaybat, pepalakuan na la." 
1Chronicles19:5 King dine ra e la minuli deting tubud. Inyang abalitan nang David ing milyari peparala yang amanu karela king e la mamako king Jerico at e magbalik anggang e tinubu ing balbas da. 
1Chronicles19:6 Balu nang Aring Hanun at ding tauan na king mua ya karela i David, inya king halus alagang apat apulung toneladang pilak menupa lang karung panggera at taung sake kareti a ibat king Matas nang Dake ning Mesopotamia at Siria ampon king Maaca at Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Atlu lang pulu't aduang libu ding inupahan dang karung panggera subali pa karing sundalus na ning ari ning Maaca. Migkampu la malapit king Medeba. Dinatang la naman ding Ammonita a ibat karing karelang siudad at makasadia lang makilaban. 
1Chronicles19:8 Inyang abalitan nang David iti, tiburan ne i Joab at ding sablang sundalus na ning kayarian." 
1Chronicles19:9 Linage la ring Ammonita at migpuestu la para king pamakilaban karin king dalan palub king Rabba, ing sentrung siudad da. Migpuestu la naman king malualas a lugal ding aring dinatang ban sumaup karela." 
1Chronicles19:10 Inyang ikit nang Joab king sagupa la ring kalaban da king arap at king kagulutan da, pinili na la ding magaling nang sundalus ning Israel at pinuestu na la arapan da ring sundalus na ning Siria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Pepanibala na la ring aliwang sundalus ning Israel kang Abisai a kapatad na at pinuestu na la arap da ring sundalung Ammonita. 
1Chronicles19:12 Nganang Joab, Nung akit mung masasambut kami karing sundalus na ning Siria, saupan mu kami, at nung akit ku namang masasambut kayu karing sundalus na ning Ammon, saupan da kayu." 
1Chronicles19:13 E mu painan ing lub mu! Magpakatatag ka! Anggang agyu tamu makilaban tamu para karing kabalen tamu at para karing siudad na ning Dios. Ing kaburian na sana ning Ginu ya ing mapalyari. 
1Chronicles19:14 Sinagupa la ding sundalus na ning Israel a panimunan nang Joab, at memulayi lang tinakas ding kalaban a sundalus na ning Siria." 
1Chronicles19:15 Inyang ikit da lang tatakas deti, tinakas na la naman ding sundalus na ning Ammon kang Abisai a kapatad nang Joab, at minta la king karelang siudad. Kaybat na nita, migbalik ne Jerusalem i Joab." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ikit da ring sundalus na ning Siria king e ra la agyung labanan ding Israelita, inya meniawad lang saklolu karing kayabe rang atyu king lipat na ning Ilug ning Eufrates. Sinaklolu no man ding sundalung panimunan nang Sofac, ing pekapun da ring sundalus nang Hadadezer." 
1Chronicles19:17 Agad mibalita iti kang David at kanita mu rin pepasadia ne ing mabilug nang puersa ning Israel. Lipatan de ing Ilug ning Jordan at pekasadia ra ing sarili da para king pamakilaban. 
1Chronicles19:18 Sinugud la ding Israelita at apayatrasan da la ring kalaban. Mekapate lang pitung libung sundalus a pakasake karung panggera at apat apulung libung sundalus a e makasake kabayu at pati na ing pekapun dang i Sofac. 
1Chronicles19:19 Inyang ikit da ring ari a kakampi nang Aring Hadadezer king mesambut la king puersa ning Israel, sinuku la at mekipagpayapa kang David at meging ipus na la." 
1Chronicles19:20 Manibat na kanita e na la bisang sumaup ding tau Siria karing tau na ning Ammon. 
1Chronicles20:1 King pamagumpisa na ning banua, ing panaun nung kapilan la makigera ding ari, linual la ding sundalus na ning Israel a panimunan nang Joab at lisuban de ing bansa ning Ammon. Liban de ing siudad ning Rabba at pinatag king gabun. Menatili ya kanita i Aring David king Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:2 Kinua neng David ing iyas a batung mal a palamuti na ning korona nang gintu ning rebultu nang Molek a kikilalanan dang dios ding Ammonita. Titimbang yang pitung pulu't limang libra iting korona. Kinua neng David iting iyas at kebit ne king korona na. Dakal ya rin ikuang pibandian king siudad. 
1Chronicles20:3 Binihag na la ding memalen na ning Ammon at dininan na lang lagari, sarulgamat ampon palakul, at kaybat pepagobran na la king siudad. Makanyan munaman ing gewa na karing sablang memalen da ring aliwang siudad ning Ammon. Kaybat na nita, migbalik ne i David at ding sundalus na king Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 E miglambat akalaban da no naman ding Filisteo king Gezer. Kaniting labanan, apate neng Sibecai ning Husa ing higanting milagyuan Sippai, at mesambut la ding Filisteo." 
1Chronicles20:5 King aliwa pang pamakilaban karing Filisteo, apate neng Elhanan a anak nang Jair i Lami a kapatad nang Goliat ning Gat a ing pulu ning tandus na kasing dagul ne ning pabakle na ning pipamabalan imalan." 
1Chronicles20:6 Mika aliwa pang labanan a milyari king Gat. Ating higanti karin a maki anam a taliri king gamat na at bitis na. Lahi de ring higanti kanitang minunang panaun. 
1Chronicles20:7 Lepastangan ne ing Israel, inya pete neng Jonatan a pangunakan nang David king kapatad nang i Samma." 
1Chronicles20:8 Pete na lang David at ding tauan na deting atlung higanti a lahi da ring higanti na ning Gat. 
1Chronicles21:1 Buri nang Satanas ing guluan ne ing Israel, inya inagkat ne i David ban gawang sensus tungkul king bilang da ring memalen." 
1Chronicles21:2 Nganang minutus David kang Joab at karing aliwa pang opisyal na, Lumibut kayu king mabilug a Israel, manibat king Beerseba angga king Dan, uling buri kung abalu ing bilang da ring memalen." 
1Chronicles21:3 Nganang Joab, Mananu na sanang parakalan na lang dinalan a besis ning Ginu ding memalen na ning Israel kesa king sadia! Makamal a Ari, obat buri yung daptan yan kabang talasuyu yu no man? Buri yung panamdaman na ning mabilug a bansa ing mikasala la?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Oneng ing buri na ning ari ya ing mepalyari, inya linibut ya i Joab king mabilug a Israel at kaybat mibalik ya king Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Minie yang ulat kang Aring David tungkul karing sablang lalaking malyaring gawan sundalus: metung lang milyun at dinalan a libu ring king Israel at apat lang dalan pitung pulung libu ring king Juda. 
1Chronicles21:6 E na la inabeng Joab ding bilang da ring king tribu nang Levi at Benjamin, uling talagang e ne buring pamintuan ing utus na ning ari." 
1Chronicles21:7 E ya metula ing Dios king milyari, inya perusan ne ing Israel." 
1Chronicles21:8 Nganang David king Dios, Mekarapat kung maragul a pamikasala king kapamilatan na ning pamagsensus. Kamulangan ing depat ku. Patawaran mu ku sana." 
1Chronicles21:9 Kanita ngana ning Ginu kang Gad, ing propeta nang David," 
1Chronicles21:10 Puntalan me i David, at papamilinan meng metung karing atlung bage a ibie ku. At ita ing daptan ku kang David." 
1Chronicles21:11 Pintalan neng Gad i David at sinabi na itang pasabi na ning Ginu. Kitnan ne, Isanu kareti ing buri yu:" 
1Chronicles21:12 atlung banua ning danup o atlung bulan a tatakasan mu la ding kalaban o atlung aldo ning salut, at kamatayan king bansa a daptan na ning anghel ning Ginu? Nanu ing pakibat yu a ibie ku king Ginu?" 
1Chronicles21:13 Pekibat nang David, Gipit ing kabilian ku! Oneng e ku buri ing parusan da ku ring tau. Ing Ginu na mismu ing mamarusa kanaku uling malunusan ya." 
1Chronicles21:14 Inya peparala yang salut ing Ginu karing memalen na ning Israel, at pitung pulung libu la ring mete."
